note: Measurement-only task: how strong is the self-engine at Edax-matched depth (10 vs 10). No code changes to engine/app. Adoption of depth-based search is out of scope.

deviationFromT175.requested: T175 baseline is depth12+MPC; this task changes only depth (12 -> 10).
deviationFromT175.actualFinding: T175 (both P1 and P2) did not pass --mpc-margin-t (the flag did not exist yet at T175's execution time; it was added in T176). T175 therefore ran with the implicit default calibration table, which corresponds to margin t=1.5. This task's spec explicitly requests margin t=1.0 (the T176-selected candidate value). Both differences (depth 12->10 AND margin t 1.5(implicit)->1.0(explicit)) are present versus T175, not depth alone.
deviationFromT175.resolution: Followed the task file's explicit requirement (t=1.0) since it was stated multiple times and is more specific than the delegation summary. Both differing settings keys are recorded explicitly in t194_depth10_compare.py's settingsGuard.expectedDiffering and in the report's section 0/1.

compareScript: bench/edax-compare/t194_depth10_compare.py (new, adapted from T176's t176_confirmation_compare.py; excludes engine_depth and engine_mpc_margin_t from the required-matching-settings guard since they are the intentional experimental variables here)
